## What We Were Doing
- Task: Replaced hand-written MDX post stubs with a Substack-driven content pipeline
- Progress:

  - [ ] Sidequests demo video still needed for Phase 5 completion

## Decisions
- Substack = source of truth for post titles, descriptions, dates, URLs
- `post-enrichment.ts` = source of truth for relatedProject, series, tags (local intent)
- Content collection loader merges both at build time
- No more MDX post stubs — `pnpm refresh:substack` + `post-enrichment.ts` is the pipeline
- Badge system: status-driven ("Live"/"Building") instead of featured/live
- Badge colors: OKLCH via scoped CSS (reliable in both modes)
- Video UX: autoplay+loop, click-to-pause overlay, IntersectionObserver scroll-pause
- Video compression: 1280px, VP9 CRF 35 (webm) + H264 CRF 28 (mp4), audio stripped
- Project card layout: title+badge+Live/Source on one row, Analysis/Writeup+tags together
- Dependencies: 14 (no radix-ui, no lucide-react); icons inlined or in data/icons.ts
- Previous decisions still apply: warm-tinted design, config-driven, no h1 on homepage/about

## Open Items
- Phase 5: Sidequests demo video (3rd featured project)
- Phase 6: Deploy & cutover to eeshans.com
- Bidirectional project↔writing links

- Projects page: no hero/larger card treatment for featured projects
- SEO OG images not yet added
- If a new Substack post is published, run `pnpm refresh:substack` then add enrichment to `src/data/post-enrichment.ts`
- `src/lib/substack.ts` is now only used by the content collection loader, not by pages directly; could be simplified

## Resume Plan
1. Record Sidequests demo video → compress → add to project frontmatter → Phase 5 complete

## Notes
- User controls the dev server — do not start one unless asked
- Do not push commits without asking
- `.env` contains GITHUB_TOKEN + PostHog keys — never print or commit
- Substack refresh: `pnpm refresh:substack` — updates `.cache/substack-feed.json`
- Post enrichment: `src/data/post-enrichment.ts` — add series/tags/relatedProject per slug
- Posts are Substack-sourced: custom content collection loader reads cache + enrichment, no more MDX stubs
- Content editing guide at CONTENT.md
- Architecture doc at internal_docs/portfolio-architecture.md
- Brand vision doc at internal_docs/portfolio-rebuild-analysis.md
- Demo video workflow: drop .mp4 in `public/videos/`, compress with ffmpeg, update project MDX frontmatter
